final.title: Paths to low-carbon development in China: The role of government environmental target constraints
final.abstract: Research background: To achieve the targets for carbon peak and air quality improvement, local governments should propose environmental targets and develop realization paths that are tailored to their unique local conditions. They then promote low-carbon development through the implementation of multiple measures. Purpose of the article: As the government performance appraisal system im-proves, the question arises as to whether governments take the initiative to com-bine environmental policies with government target constraints to reduce carbon emissions. Methods: The announcement of environmental target constraints by local governments in government work reports is considered a quasi-natural experiment. This study examines the effect of government environmental target constraints (GETC) on carbon emissions (CEs) using differences-in-differences (DID), propensity score matching-DID (PSM-DID), and spatial-DID (SDID) with data from 241 Chinese cities from 2003 to 2019. Findings & value added: The results demonstrate that GETC can effectively reduce local CEs, with the inhibitory effect being most effective in the first two years after setting environmental targets, but diminishing in the third year. GETC can reduce local CEs through three paths: reducing energy consumption, promoting industrial structure optimization, and encouraging green technology innovation. Spatial spillover effects show that GETC reduces local CEs while exacerbating CEs in neighboring cities, indicating a beggar-thy-neighbor effect in conventional environmental regulation policy. This effect is obse
final.finding_zh: 政府环境目标约束（GETC）能有效减少地方碳排放，主要通过减少能源消耗、促进产业结构优化和鼓励绿色技术创新三条路径实现。然而，GETC在第三年后的抑制效果减弱，且存在邻近城市碳排放加剧的‘以邻为壑’效应。
final.reference_value_zh: 对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，特别是在研究方法（DID、PSM-DID、SDID）和政策效果分析方面。论文探讨了政府环境目标约束对碳排放的影响路径，可为京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应研究提供理论和实证参考。
final.method_zh: 研究采用了2003年至2019年241个中国城市的面板数据，运用了DID、PSM-DID和SDID方法分析政府环境目标约束对碳排放的影响。
final.limitations_zh: 本文仅提供了对政府环境目标约束在减少碳排放方面的作用机制和效果的分析，但未具体探讨京津冀区域的特殊情况。此外，数据截止到2019年，对于近年来政策变化的影响分析有限，需要进一步核验。
final.summary_zh: 主要发现：政府环境目标约束（GETC）能有效减少地方碳排放，主要通过减少能源消耗、促进产业结构优化和鼓励绿色技术创新三条路径实现。然而，GETC在第三年后的抑制效果减弱，且存在邻近城市碳排放加剧的‘以邻为壑’效应。 参考价值：对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，特别是在研究方法（DID、PSM-DID、SDID）和政策效果分析方面。论文探讨了政府环境目标约束对碳排放的影响路径，可为京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应研究提供理论和实证参考。

final.title: Toward low‐carbon sustainable development: Exploring the impact of digital economy development and industrial restructuring
final.abstract: Abstract Low‐carbon sustainable development is considered an essential strategy for achieving economic growth and environmental protection, requiring a fundamental transformation of the industrial structure, including developing clean technologies, promoting energy efficiency, and adopting sustainable production and consumption patterns. Simultaneously, the evolving digital economy is acknowledged as an essential driver in optimizing the industrial structure. Therefore, can digital economy development reshape the industrial structure and lead to low‐carbon sustainable development? The main purpose of this paper is to examine the mediating role of industrial structure upgrading in the relationship between the digital economy and low‐carbon development. Its ultimate purpose is to explore more possible paths to achieve low‐carbon development. This paper builds a regression model based on the data of cities. We found that digital economic development can directly promote low‐carbon sustainable development, a conclusion that still holds after endogeneity discussion and robustness testing. Additionally, digital economy development can promote industrial structure upgrading and thus promote low‐carbon sustainable development, meaning that industrial structure upgrading is an effective mechanism for digital economy development to promote low‐carbon sustainable development. This paper provides empirical evidence for the positive environmental externalities of digital economic development and establishes a basic research framework of “digital economic development → industrial structu
final.finding_zh: 数字经济发展可以直接促进低碳可持续发展，并通过产业升级间接促进低碳发展。
final.reference_value_zh: 对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，特别是在探讨政策如何通过促进产业升级来实现碳减排方面。
final.method_zh: 研究方法为基于城市数据的回归模型，进行了内生性讨论和稳健性测试。
final.limitations_zh: 摘要未提及具体研究区域，需要进一步确认是否包括京津冀地区；未详细说明数据来源和时间范围，需核验这些信息以评估研究的适用性和时效性。
final.summary_zh: 主要发现：数字经济发展可以直接促进低碳可持续发展，并通过产业升级间接促进低碳发展。 参考价值：对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，特别是在探讨政策如何通过促进产业升级来实现碳减排方面。

final.title: ESG performance and green innovation: An investigation based on quantile regression
final.abstract: Abstract Using panel data from 37 countries from 1990 to 2019 and applying a quantile regression approach with panel fixed effects, we investigate the impact of national Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) performance on green innovation and how this impact varies across different green innovation capacity distributions. The research conclusions are as follows. (1) National ESG performance improvement significantly promotes green innovation. (2) The improvement of environmental performance and governance performance significantly promotes green innovation, but in countries with weak green innovation capabilities, the improvement of social performance reduces the output of green innovation. (3) The role of national ESG performance in promoting green innovation is stronger in countries with weak green innovation capabilities. (4) In non‐high‐income countries, the stronger the green innovation capability is, the more obvious is the promotion of ESG performance to green innovation. The findings of this paper provide empirical evidence and a policy basis for governments to focus on improving ESG performance and to commit to promoting green innovation activities more effectively.
final.finding_zh: 国家ESG表现的提升显著促进了绿色创新，尤其在绿色创新能力较弱的国家中作用更为明显；环境和治理表现的提升对绿色创新有显著促进作用，但在绿色创新能力较弱的国家中，社会表现的提升反而可能减少绿色创新的产出。
final.reference_value_zh: 对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，可以借鉴其关于ESG表现对绿色创新影响的分析，特别是环境治理部分，来探讨京津冀区域协调发展政策对碳减排的促进作用。
final.method_zh: 研究方法为基于面板数据的分位数回归分析，使用了1990年至2019年37个国家的数据。面板固定效应模型被用于控制未观测到的国家间异质性。
final.limitations_zh: 摘要中未提及具体如何定义和测量ESG表现和绿色创新能力，这些定义和测量方法需要进一步查阅全文确认；此外，研究的国家范围和时间跨度与京津冀区域的具体情况存在差异，应用时需考虑地区特性和最新发展情况。
final.summary_zh: 主要发现：国家ESG表现的提升显著促进了绿色创新，尤其在绿色创新能力较弱的国家中作用更为明显；环境和治理表现的提升对绿色创新有显著促进作用，但在绿色创新能力较弱的国家中，社会表现的提升反而可能减少绿色创新的产出。 参考价值：对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，可以借鉴其关于ESG表现对绿色创新影响的分析，特别是环境治理部分，来探讨京津冀区域协调发展政策对碳减排的促进作用。

final.title: Does the carbon emission trading pilot policy promote green innovation cooperation? Evidence from a quasi-natural experiment in China
final.abstract: Abstract Green and low carbon transition is a broad and profound economic and social systematic change. Green innovation is a critical way to promote energy saving and emission reduction. Has China continuously promoted a carbon emission trading policy to significantly promote green innovation cooperation? Taking the implementation of the carbon emission trading pilot policy as a “quasi-natural experiment,” this study answers this question by exploring the impact of the policy on green innovation cooperation. Based on data on 274 cities from 2008 to 2020, the multi-time difference-in-differences model is used to evaluate the impact of the policy on green innovation cooperation. The results reveal that the carbon emission trading pilot policy significantly improved inter- and intra-city green innovation cooperation through the upgrading effect of industrial structure and the coverage effect of digital finance compared with the non-pilot cities at the city level. In addition, there are significant differences in the policy effects among cities with different degrees of openness to the outside world and command-and-control environmental regulation.
final.finding_zh: 碳排放交易试点政策显著促进了城市间的绿色创新合作，通过产业结构升级和数字金融覆盖效应实现。不同开放程度和命令控制型环境监管强度的城市政策效果存在显著差异。
final.reference_value_zh: 对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）的政策效果评估环节有参考价值，特别是其使用DID模型评估政策影响的方法。
final.method_zh: 研究方法为多时点差分法（DID），数据来源为2008年至2020年中国274个城市的面板数据，包括绿色专利合作网络矩阵等。
final.limitations_zh: 已阅读全文。需要进一步核验的是绿色专利合作网络矩阵的具体构建方法及其对结果的影响。
final.summary_zh: 主要发现：碳排放交易试点政策显著促进了城市间的绿色创新合作，通过产业结构升级和数字金融覆盖效应实现。不同开放程度和命令控制型环境监管强度的城市政策效果存在显著差异。 参考价值：对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）的政策效果评估环节有参考价值，特别是其使用DID模型评估政策影响的方法。

candidates.title: Research on the coordinated development of provincial urbanization and carbon emission efficiency of construction industry in China
candidates.abstract: BACKGROUND: Energy conservation and emission reduction policies restrict the economic and social development of all countries in the world, and the impact on China, which has low urbanization, is more serious. In the process of promoting urbanization, the pressure of carbon emission reduction in the construction industry has increased, and the high emissions of the construction industry have made the low-carbon development of cities face severe challenges. China is at a critical stage of urbanization development, and there is become a general consensus on how to improve the carbon emission efficiency of the construction industry. The interaction between urbanization and the carbon emission efficiency of the construction industry is a long-term and complex process. As one of the industries contributing to China's urbanization process and carbon emissions, it is of great practical significance to explore the coordination relationship between urbanization and the carbon emission efficiency of the construction industry (CEECI) to realize the goal of "double carbon", promoting urbanization construction and solving the problem of "green development". Taking 30 provinces in China as the research target area, the double weighted summation method and the undesirable output superefficiency window-EBM-DEA model are used to measure the provincial urbanization level and CEECI, respectively. Then, the coupling coordination degree model of the relative development index is introduced, and the spatial autocorrelation model and the spatial and temporal differentiation characteristics of the
candidates.finding_zh: 研究发现，中国各省份的城市化水平与建筑行业碳排放效率（CEECI）的协调度正逐步提升，但相对发展度却在下降。东部省份的协调度较高，而北京是唯一进入协调阶段的省份。
candidates.reference_value_zh: 对于论文1，本研究的DID方法可以作为参考，用于分析京津冀区域协调发展政策对碳减排效应的影响。对于论文2，本研究的空间自相关模型分析方法可以为京津冀与全国隐含碳责任分担研究提供空间分析视角。对于论文3，本研究关于城市化与碳排放效率协调发展的优化路径建议，可以为林业碳汇CCER价值实现与生态保护激励机制提供政策制定参考。
candidates.method_zh: 研究采用了双权重求和法和非期望产出超效率窗口-EBM-DEA模型分别测量省级城市化水平和CEECI，随后引入相对发展指数的耦合协调度模型，分析了城市化与CEECI的协调水平的空间自相关模型及其时空分异特征。
candidates.limitations_zh: 本研究仅分析了中国30个省份的数据，未包括所有省份。此外，研究中使用的熵方法和变异系数法虽然弥补了熵方法的缺陷，但其结果仍可能受到单一权重方法的影响。
candidates.summary_zh: 主要发现：研究发现，中国各省份的城市化水平与建筑行业碳排放效率（CEECI）的协调度正逐步提升，但相对发展度却在下降。东部省份的协调度较高，而北京是唯一进入协调阶段的省份。 参考价值：对于论文1，本研究的DID方法可以作为参考，用于分析京津冀区域协调发展政策对碳减排效应的影响。对于论文2，本研究的空间自相关模型分析方法可以为京津冀与全国隐含碳责任分担研究提供空间分析视角。对于论文3，本研究关于城市化与碳排放效率协调发展的优化路径建议，可以为林业碳汇CCER价值实现与生态保护激励机制提供政策制定参考。

candidates.title: Worsening Carbon Inequality Embodied in Trade within China
candidates.abstract: High Resolution Image Download MS PowerPoint Slide The mismatch between trade-embodied economic benefits and CO 2 emissions causes carbon inequality, which is seldom analyzed from the intracountry level, especially across a long-term period. This study applied an environmentally extended multiregional input–output model to trace this mismatch and measure the carbon inequality quantitatively within China during 2007–2017. The results show that during the past decade, China’s national carbon inequality was continuously worsening with carbon Gini coefficients rising regardless of production- (0.21–0.30) or consumption-based (0.12–0.18) accounting. The regional carbon inequality was deteriorating, where less developed provinces with 20% of total value-added emitted 32.9% of total CO 2 emissions in 2007, while this figure rose to 42.6% in 2017. The eastern provinces (Jiangsu and Shanghai) had entered into net economic and carbon beneficiaries keeping high trade advantages, by contrast the northwest provinces (Ningxia and Xinjiang) were trapped in a lose–lose situation with trade benefits declining by 68%. The southwest provinces (Yunnan and Guangxi) shifted from being net carbon and value-added exporters to net importers, stepping into the earlier development mode of eastern provinces. This hidden and exacerbated carbon inequality calls for regional-specific measures to avoid the dilemma of economic development and CO 2 mitigation, which also gives a good reminder for the rising economies, like India.
candidates.finding_zh: 研究发现中国国内的碳不平等在2007-2017年间持续恶化，东部省份成为经济和碳排放的双重受益者，而西北省份则陷入经济和碳排放双重损失的困境。
candidates.reference_value_zh: 对论文2（京津冀与全国隐含碳责任分担）提供参考，特别是在分析区域间碳责任分担不平等及其变化趋势时，可以借鉴本研究的方法和结论。
candidates.method_zh: 研究采用了环境扩展的多区域投入产出模型来追踪经济利益与CO2排放之间的不匹配，并量化了中国国内的碳不平等。
candidates.limitations_zh: 摘要中未提及具体的数据来源和模型参数设定，这些内容需要进一步查阅全文以确认。此外，研究结果是否适用于京津冀区域的具体情况，需要结合该区域的经济和环境数据进行分析验证。
candidates.summary_zh: 主要发现：研究发现中国国内的碳不平等在2007-2017年间持续恶化，东部省份成为经济和碳排放的双重受益者，而西北省份则陷入经济和碳排放双重损失的困境。 参考价值：对论文2（京津冀与全国隐含碳责任分担）提供参考，特别是在分析区域间碳责任分担不平等及其变化趋势时，可以借鉴本研究的方法和结论。

candidates.title: The greenhouse gas emissions of pharmaceutical consumption and production: an input–output analysis over time and across global supply chains
candidates.abstract: BACKGROUND: Health care substantially contributes to global greenhouse gas emissions, but for pharmaceuticals, this is mostly understood through case studies of individual medicines. Using newly compiled international databases, we aimed to analyse global greenhouse gas emissions from pharmaceutical consumption and production over time and across supply chains. METHODS: We quantified the pharmaceutical greenhouse gas footprint across 77 regions from 1995 to 2019 using environmentally extended multi-regional input-output (EE-MRIO) analysis, then conducted structural decomposition analysis to assess key drivers. To identify producers' full supply chain emission responsibility and mitigation opportunities, we performed structural path analysis and assessed scope 1-3 emissions, supported by a Sankey diagram visualisation. Our analysis was based on data from the EE-MRIO database developed by the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (Inter-Country Input-Output tables 2023) and validated using the EE-MRIO database developed by Eurostat (FIGARO-2024). FINDINGS: From 1995 to 2019, the global pharmaceutical greenhouse gas footprint grew by 77%. This increase was primarily driven by rising pharmaceutical final expenditure, especially in China, and efficiency gains stalling after 2008. High-income countries contributed, on average, a nine-times to ten-times higher pharmaceutical greenhouse gas footprint per capita than lower-middle-income countries in 1995-2019. Supply chain emissions varied substantially among major suppliers in intensity, overseas displacement, and
candidates.finding_zh: 1995年至2019年，全球药品温室气体足迹增长了77%，主要驱动力是药品最终支出的增加，尤其是在中国，以及2008年后效率提升的停滞。高收入国家的人均药品温室气体足迹比中低收入国家高出9到10倍。
candidates.reference_value_zh: 对论文2（京津冀与全国隐含碳责任分担）的多区域投入产出（MRIO）分析方法有可操作参考价值，特别是在分析不同区域间的碳排放责任分担和供应链排放方面。
candidates.method_zh: 研究方法为环境扩展多区域投入产出（EE-MRIO）分析，结合结构分解分析和结构路径分析，评估了1995年至2019年间77个地区的药品温室气体足迹及其关键驱动因素。数据来源为OECD的国际投入产出表2023和Eurostat的FIGARO-2024数据库。
candidates.limitations_zh: 摘要中未提供具体的研究模型和假设检验方法，需要进一步阅读全文以了解详细的分析过程和结果验证方法。此外，研究的时间范围和数据来源可能影响结果的普遍性和时效性，需结合最新数据进行核验。
candidates.summary_zh: 主要发现：1995年至2019年，全球药品温室气体足迹增长了77%，主要驱动力是药品最终支出的增加，尤其是在中国，以及2008年后效率提升的停滞。高收入国家的人均药品温室气体足迹比中低收入国家高出9到10倍。 参考价值：对论文2（京津冀与全国隐含碳责任分担）的多区域投入产出（MRIO）分析方法有可操作参考价值，特别是在分析不同区域间的碳排放责任分担和供应链排放方面。

candidates.title: Co-benefits of CO2 emission reduction from China’s clean air actions between 2013-2020
candidates.abstract: Abstract Climate change mitigation measures can yield substantial air quality improvements while emerging clean air measures in developing countries can also lead to CO 2 emission mitigation co-benefits by affecting the local energy system. Here, we evaluate the effect of China’s stringent clean air actions on its energy use and CO 2 emissions from 2013-2020. We find that widespread phase-out and upgrades of outdated, polluting, and inefficient combustion facilities during clean air actions have promoted the transformation of the country’s energy system. The co-benefits of China’s clean air measures far outweigh the additional CO 2 emissions of end-of-pipe devices, realizing a net accumulative reduction of 2.43 Gt CO 2 from 2013-2020, exceeding the accumulated CO 2 emission increase in China (2.03 Gt CO 2 ) during the same period. Our study indicates that China’s efforts to tackle air pollution induce considerable climate benefit, and measures with remarkable CO 2 reduction co-benefits deserve further attention in future policy design.
candidates.finding_zh: 中国2013-2020年的清洁空气行动通过淘汰和升级过时、污染和低效的燃烧设施，促进了能源系统的转型，实现了2.43 Gt CO2的净累积减排，超过了同期中国CO2排放的累积增长量（2.03 Gt CO2）。
candidates.reference_value_zh: 对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，特别是在分析政策对能源系统转型及碳减排的具体影响方面。
candidates.method_zh: 研究采用了中国多分辨率排放清单模型（MEIC）框架下的自下而上方法，评估了清洁空气措施对空气质量和CO2排放的影响。数据来源包括政府收集的实际实施率（未公开数据）。
candidates.limitations_zh: 该研究基于2013-2020年的数据，对于未来政策设计的长期影响评估有限。此外，研究中使用的部分政府数据未公开，可能影响结果的透明度和可验证性。
candidates.summary_zh: 主要发现：中国2013-2020年的清洁空气行动通过淘汰和升级过时、污染和低效的燃烧设施，促进了能源系统的转型，实现了2.43 Gt CO2的净累积减排，超过了同期中国CO2排放的累积增长量（2.03 Gt CO2）。 参考价值：对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，特别是在分析政策对能源系统转型及碳减排的具体影响方面。

candidates.title: Afforestation as a mitigation strategy: countering climate-induced risk of forest carbon sink in China
candidates.abstract:
Abstract
          
            Background
            China has made substantial efforts in afforestation since the 1970s, significantly contributing to the country’s forest carbon sink. However, the future carbon sink dynamics remain uncertain due to anticipated changes in forest age structure, climate conditions, and atmospheric CO2 concentrations. Moreover, the extent to which afforestation can enhance future carbon sequestration has not been fully quantified. This study focuses specifically on China and integrates forest growth models with Maximum Entropy (MaxEnt) models to project future carbon dynamics based on shifts in forest habitat suitability. A nature scenario is applied to evaluate potential climate-induced risks to forest carbon sequestration, while an afforestation scenario is used to assess the additional contribution from planned afforestation efforts.
          
          
            Results
            The baseline aboveground biomass (AGB) of China’s forests in 2020 is estimated at 11.59 ± 4.06 PgC. Under the nature scenario and assuming no future disturbances, the total AGB is projected to increase by 5.20–5.74 PgC by the 2050s and by 6.35–8.11 PgC by the 2070s, while carbon sequestration rates are expected to decline from 146.03 to 165.03 TgC/yr to approximately 122.98–137.80 TgC/yr. Between 11.79 and 39.60% of forests are at risk of land loss and compositional shifts in the 2070s, with the situation exacerbated under the SSP585 scenario. To mitigate climate-induced risks, the afforestation scenario proposes an additional 117.90–129.32 Mha of suitabl
candidates.finding_zh: 研究发现，中国森林的地上生物量在2020年估计为11.59±4.06 PgC，自然情景下预计到2070年代将增加6.35-8.11 PgC，但碳汇速率会下降；通过额外的117.90-129.32百万公顷造林，可以有效缓解气候变化带来的森林碳汇风险。
candidates.reference_value_zh: 对论文3（林业碳汇CCER价值实现与生态保护激励机制）中关于林业碳汇的潜力评估和生态保护措施的制定有重要参考价值，特别是通过模型预测未来碳汇动态和评估造林对缓解气候变化风险的贡献。
candidates.method_zh: 研究方法包括森林生长模型与最大熵（MaxEnt）模型的结合，用于预测未来森林栖息地适宜性的变化对碳动态的影响。数据来源未在摘要中详细说明。
candidates.limitations_zh: 摘要中未提供具体的数据来源和模型参数，需要进一步查阅全文以了解研究的详细方法和数据处理过程。此外，研究假设未来没有干扰，这在实际情况中可能难以实现，需要考虑自然和人为干扰因素的影响。
candidates.summary_zh: 主要发现：研究发现，中国森林的地上生物量在2020年估计为11.59±4.06 PgC，自然情景下预计到2070年代将增加6.35-8.11 PgC，但碳汇速率会下降；通过额外的117.90-129.32百万公顷造林，可以有效缓解气候变化带来的森林碳汇风险。 参考价值：对论文3（林业碳汇CCER价值实现与生态保护激励机制）中关于林业碳汇的潜力评估和生态保护措施的制定有重要参考价值，特别是通过模型预测未来碳汇动态和评估造林对缓解气候变化风险的贡献。

candidates.title: Achieving green environment in Brazil, Russia, India, China, and South Africa economies: Do composite risk index, green innovation, and environmental policy stringency matter?
candidates.abstract: Abstract The Paris Accord has brought the world's governments together to begin implementing plans for their individual economies to become carbon‐free. The goal of attaining low‐carbon growth is not, however, as simple as it would appear since the world economies, which are dependent on fossil fuels and are fast expanding, are concentrated on accelerating economic expansion at the price of worse environmental effects. In light of this, the study aims to investigate the combined effects of the composite risk index (CRI), green innovation (GINOV), and environmental policy stringency (EPS) on carbon dioxide (CO 2 ) emissions in the context of Brazil, Russia, India, China, and South Africa (BRICS) countries while controlling for gross domestic product (GDP) and renewable energy research and development (RERD) over the period from 1960 to 2020. The research addresses the problems of cross‐sectional dependence and slope heterogeneity in the data set used for analysis by using the second‐generation cross‐sectionally augmented autoregressive distributed lags framework to evaluate long‐ and short‐run models. The corresponding findings show cointegrating relationships between the research variables. Additionally, the results of the regression demonstrate that EPS, GINOV, and RERD contribute to a long‐term decrease in CO 2 emissions. CRI and GDP, however, increase CO 2 emissions. It is suggested that environmental policies be tightened, GINOV and RERD expenditures be promoted, political stability and institutional quality be maintained, and clean economic growth strategies be adopted
candidates.finding_zh: 研究发现，环境政策严格性、绿色创新和可再生能源研发在长期内有助于减少CO2排放，而复合风险指数和GDP则增加CO2排放。
candidates.reference_value_zh: 对于论文1，本研究的方法和发现可以为分析京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应提供参考，特别是如何评估政策严格性和创新对碳排放的影响。
candidates.method_zh: 研究使用了第二代横截面增强自回归分布滞后框架来评估长短期模型，以解决数据集中的横截面依赖性和斜率异质性问题。
candidates.limitations_zh: 本研究聚焦于BRICS国家，其结论可能不完全适用于京津冀区域的具体情况，需要进一步核验政策严格性、绿色创新等变量在该区域的适用性和影响程度。
candidates.summary_zh: 主要发现：研究发现，环境政策严格性、绿色创新和可再生能源研发在长期内有助于减少CO2排放，而复合风险指数和GDP则增加CO2排放。 参考价值：对于论文1，本研究的方法和发现可以为分析京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应提供参考，特别是如何评估政策严格性和创新对碳排放的影响。

candidates.title: Synergetic roadmap of carbon neutrality and clean air for China
candidates.abstract: It is well recognized that carbon dioxide and air pollutants share similar emission sources so that synergetic policies on climate change mitigation and air pollution control can lead to remarkable co-benefits on greenhouse gas reduction, air quality improvement, and improved health. In the context of carbon peak, carbon neutrality, and clean air policies, this perspective tracks and analyzes the process of the synergetic governance of air pollution and climate change in China by developing and monitoring 18 indicators. The 18 indicators cover the following five aspects: air pollution and associated weather-climate conditions, progress in structural transition, sources, inks, and mitigation pathway of atmospheric composition, health impacts and benefits of coordinated control, and synergetic governance system and practices. By tracking the progress in each indicator, this perspective presents the major accomplishment of coordinated control, identifies the emerging challenges toward the synergetic governance, and provides policy recommendations for designing a synergetic roadmap of Carbon Neutrality and Clean Air for China.
candidates.finding_zh: 中国在协同治理空气污染和气候变化方面取得了显著成就，通过18个指标的监测，识别了向协同治理转型过程中出现的新挑战，并提出了政策建议。
candidates.reference_value_zh: 对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，特别是在政策设计和评估方面，可以借鉴该文提出的协同治理指标体系。
candidates.method_zh: 研究方法包括指标体系的开发和监测，但具体的数据分析方法未在摘要中提及。
candidates.limitations_zh: 摘要未提供具体的研究方法和数据分析细节，需要进一步阅读全文以了解指标体系的具体构建方法和监测结果的可靠性。
candidates.summary_zh: 主要发现：中国在协同治理空气污染和气候变化方面取得了显著成就，通过18个指标的监测，识别了向协同治理转型过程中出现的新挑战，并提出了政策建议。 参考价值：对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，特别是在政策设计和评估方面，可以借鉴该文提出的协同治理指标体系。

candidates.title: Substantial differences in source contributions to carbon emissions and health damage necessitate balanced synergistic control plans in China
candidates.abstract: Abstract China’s strategy to concurrently address climate change and air pollution mitigation is hindered by a lack of comprehensive information on source contributions to health damage and carbon emissions. Here we show notable discrepancies between source contributions to CO 2 emissions and fine particulate matter (PM 2.5 )-related mortality by using adjoint emission sensitivity modeling to attribute premature mortality in 2017 to 53 sector and fuel/process combinations with high spatial resolution. Our findings reveal that monetized PM 2.5 health damage exceeds climate impacts in over half of the analyzed subsectors. In addition to coal-fired energy generators and industrial boilers, the combined health and climate costs from energy-intensive processes, diesel-powered vehicles, domestic coal combustion, and agricultural activities exceed 100 billion US dollars, with health-related costs predominating. This research highlights the critical need to integrate the social costs of health damage with climate impacts to develop more balanced mitigation strategies toward these dual goals, particularly during fuel transition and industrial structure upgrading.
candidates.finding_zh: 研究揭示了中国不同行业和燃料/工艺组合对CO2排放和PM2.5相关健康损害的贡献存在显著差异，其中某些非协同子行业（如农业活动）对健康损害的贡献远超其对CO2排放的贡献。
candidates.reference_value_zh: 对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，特别是在分析不同行业对碳排放的影响时，可以借鉴本研究的方法和发现，以更全面地评估政策效果。
candidates.method_zh: 研究采用了耦合排放清单和先进的区域空气质量模型（CMAQ）的伴随工具，对2017年中国53个行业和燃料/工艺组合的CO2排放和PM2.5相关健康损害进行了高分辨率的定量分析。
candidates.limitations_zh: 该研究主要关注中国全国范围内的数据，对于京津冀区域的具体分析可能需要进一步细化。此外，研究中未包括生物燃料加工和土地利用变化的生命周期排放，这可能影响某些行业的碳排放评估。
candidates.summary_zh: 主要发现：研究揭示了中国不同行业和燃料/工艺组合对CO2排放和PM2.5相关健康损害的贡献存在显著差异，其中某些非协同子行业（如农业活动）对健康损害的贡献远超其对CO2排放的贡献。 参考价值：对论文1（京津冀区域协调发展政策的碳减排效应）有参考价值，特别是在分析不同行业对碳排放的影响时，可以借鉴本研究的方法和发现，以更全面地评估政策效果。
